name: FieldRoutes Pest Control & Field Service API
what_it_does: FieldRoutes REST API for pest control and field service business management platform. Enables AI agents to manage customer accounts and service agreements, schedule and route technician visits, process service completion and chemical usage records, handle billing and payment collection, manage marketing campaigns, access route optimization data, and integrate field service data with accounting and CRM systems.
use_cases: Managing pest control service agreements and renewal schedules from service management agents
Optimizing technician routing and scheduling from field operations agents
Processing service completion reports and chemical application records from compliance agents
Billing and collecting payments from accounts receivable automation agents
not_for: HVAC and plumbing without pest control or lawn care field service focus
Residential cleaning without recurring service agreement management
Enterprise facilities management without small-business field service workflows
best_when: A pest control, lawn care, or specialty field service company using FieldRoutes wants AI agents to automate scheduling, routing, service documentation, and billing workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Customer home address and service history is sensitive. Pest control chemical application records may have regulatory compliance requirements. Employee GPS routing requires labor law compliance.

auth.notes: FieldRoutes uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. API access available to integration partners. ServiceTitan subsidiary — may align with ServiceTitan API patterns.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — field service enterprise SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-tech monthly pricing; enterprise contracts for large companies
pricing.notes: Scottsdale, Arizona company. Founded 2012 as PestRoutes, rebranded as FieldRoutes in 2021. Acquired by ServiceTitan in 2021. Market leader for pest control software in the US.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Customer home address and service history data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
ServiceTitan acquisition 2021 — API may integrate with ServiceTitan roadmap
Pest control chemical application records may have EPA/state regulatory requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer service and chemical application data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. ServiceTitan subsidiary.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer home and chemical application data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. API key only. US data residency.
